knowledge_objects.name: Gradient
knowledge_objects.source_span: The gradient collects the partial derivatives of a scalar function.

knowledge_objects.name: Gradient Descent
knowledge_objects.source_span: Gradient descent uses the gradient to update parameters.

knowledge_objects.name: Taylor Remainder
knowledge_objects.source_span: A Taylor remainder describes the error left after truncating a Taylor expansion.

knowledge_objects.name: Optimisation Problem
knowledge_objects.source_span: An optimisation problem asks for an input that minimizes an objective.

knowledge_objects.name: Learning Rate
knowledge_objects.source_span: gradient descent is a method applied to such problems
